Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

Class FunctionDeclarationBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.FunctionDeclarationBuilder
  • public class FunctionDeclarationBuilder
extends Object
    Builder for creating FunctionDeclaration instances.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

      • withParameters

        public SchemaBuilder withParameters()
        Creates a new SchemaBuilder for building the function parameters.
        Returns:
        A new SchemaBuilder instance.

      • build

        public FunctionDeclaration build()
        Builds a FunctionDeclaration instance based on the configured parameters.
        Returns:
        The built FunctionDeclaration instance.

      • and

        public ToolBuilder and()
        Adds the built FunctionDeclaration instance to the list of function declarations in the parent builder.
        Returns:
        The parent ToolBuilder instance for method chaining.
